name: Passover Chocolate Mandrin Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat or in a double boiler, melt the margarine and sugar with vanilla, orange juice, orange liqueur, and coffee. Stir to blend. Remove from heat and add chocolate, stirring until melted.
2. Cool well and whisk in eggs until thoroughly incorporated. Pour into a 9-inch spring-form pan lined with parchment paper. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 45 minutes until the top has a slight crust and seems set.
3. Refrigerate several hours. Serve cold with strawberry puree or dust the top with cocoa and garnish the center with strawberries. Makes 14 to 16 servings.
